mandatory_gates.rule: Every action dimension changes a conserved physical trajectory and at least one canonical/guardrail endpoint in a preregistered liveness test.
At least two actions are uniquely optimal in at least 15% of reachable live states each; no action or fixed sequence is optimal in more than 85%.
Resource-restricted H_PI is computed against the complete same-contract comparator and has LCB95 at least 0.01.
A deployable non-anticipative non-neural policy has H_obs LCB95 at least 0.01.
Candidate use is componentwise non-superior for every named budget; scalar token sums are insufficient when components are not substitutable.
Lost orders are non-inferior under the frozen margin.
Worst-product, worst-CSSU or worst-node fill is non-inferior.
CVaR/tail outcomes do not contradict the mean result.
Every gate survives multiple adjacent plausible, independently sourced cells.
Real rollout value is positive; oracle-action classification accuracy is not sufficient.
Real signal beats block-shuffled, post-commitment delayed and wrong-location/product signals with paired CI above zero.
Fail-closed whitelist excludes latent state, future tape events, seed IDs, future lead times, oracle actions and any post-decision information.
Modal complete sequence, calibration-only calendar and phase-only controls strictly underperform under identical tapes/resources.
Removing the proposed mechanism produces H_obs equivalence within [-0.002,0.002] and action-equivalent hashes where exact equivalence is expected.

comparator_minimum: all full-horizon open-loop schedules where tractable
certified optimization bound and approximation gap otherwise
periodic calendars through the full episode
interpretable policies proposed during the search
